---
title: "Shift Avoid Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['shift: "avoid"']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

This tests `shift: "avoid"` - notes only shift when hitting fixed elements.

Line with fixed note [FIXED: anchor point]{.column-margin shift="false"}.
Line with avoid note [AVOID: I only shift if I hit something fixed]{.column-margin shift="avoid"}.
Line with another avoid [AVOID 2: same behavior]{.column-margin shift="avoid"}.
